sponsorUser.name: Alice Chen
sponsorUser.title: Head of Partnerships
sponsorUser.companyDescription: Acme Protocol is a leading Layer 2 scaling solution powering 12M+ weekly transactions.

events.name: ETHMilan 2025
events.tagline: The Premier Ethereum Conference in Southern Europe
events.description: ETHMilan 2025 brings together the brightest minds in Ethereum, DeFi, and Web3 for two days of talks, workshops, and networking in the heart of Milan. Join 800+ developers, founders, investors, and ecosystem builders shaping the future of decentralized technology.

stats.audienceProfile: Ethereum developers (45%), DeFi/protocol founders (20%), investors & VCs (15%), ecosystem builders (10%), media (10%)

items.shortDescription: Maximum visibility. Own the ETHMilan 2025 name, stage, and narrative.
items.longDescription: The Title Sponsor receives exclusive "Presented by" co-branding across all ETHMilan channels, the opening keynote slot, the largest booth on the event floor, and premiere logo placement everywhere from the venue entrance to livestream overlays.

items.shortDescription: Major stage presence, prominent booth, and deep audience engagement.
items.longDescription: The Premium sponsorship package gives your brand a main stage panel slot, a 4×4m booth in the prime networking area, and prominent placement across all digital and physical channels throughout the event.

benefits.label: Logo Placement
benefits.value: Top tier — all print and digital

items.shortDescription: Strong brand visibility and networking access at a mid-tier investment.
items.longDescription: Silver sponsorship delivers solid brand exposure through logo placements, a 3×2m booth, a speaking lightning talk, and digital mentions — ideal for protocols and teams looking to build awareness in the European Ethereum community.

items.shortDescription: Entry-level brand presence — perfect for ecosystem projects and DAOs.
items.longDescription: Community sponsorship is designed for smaller teams, ecosystems, and DAOs who want to show up at ETHMilan without the full-booth commitment. You get logo presence, digital mentions, and attendee passes.

items.shortDescription: Brand the coffee station serving 800 attendees all day.
Sponsor the networking lunch for 800 attendees — maximum dwell time.
Your logo on every attendee badge and lanyard for maximum impressions.
Brand the secondary stage used for workshops and breakout sessions.
Rotating brand ads on all venue screens during breaks and transitions.

benefits.label: Screen slots
benefits.value: 30s looping ad on all venue screens

items.shortDescription: Dedicated sponsor section in the ETHMilan newsletter (8,500 subs).
Design a package that fits your goals. Tell us what you need.

events.name: ETHMilan 2026
events.tagline: Southern Europe's Flagship Ethereum Summit Returns
events.description: ETHMilan 2026 builds on the success of 2025 with a larger venue, 1,200+ attendees, and an expanded programme spanning three tracks: core protocol, DeFi & RWA, and consumer applications. Three days of talks, workshops, and the best networking in Southern Europe.

items.shortDescription: "Presented by" co-branding across the entire event — exclusive, one slot.
Top-tier presence: main stage panel, 6×4m booth, and premier digital placement.
Strong stage presence with a 4×4m booth and side stage talk.
Solid brand visibility with 3×2m booth and lightning talk.
Entry-level visibility — ideal for DAOs, protocols, and ecosystem projects.
Name and fund one of the ETHMilan 2026 hackathon tracks.
Your logo on every badge and lanyard worn by 1,200 attendees.
Headline the official ETHMilan 2026 after-party (300 guests, invite-only).

events.name: ETHBerlin 2026
events.description: ETHBerlin returns to the OHM venue for its sixth edition. Focused on privacy, decentralisation, and open-source values — ETHBerlin is the most hacker-centric Ethereum conference in Europe. Expect 900 developers, no suits, and 48 hours of building.

items.shortDescription: Top billing at the most hacker-focused Ethereum conference in Europe.
Post $20K+ in bounties and have your challenges featured prominently at the hackathon.
Post $5K–20K in bounties and reach ETHBerlin's builder-first audience.
Power the build — provide cloud credits, RPC endpoints, or dev tooling to 900 hackers.

benefits.label: Logo
benefits.value: On hacker welcome kit and portal

items.shortDescription: Logo placement, a table at the networking area, and hacker passes.
Keep 900 hackers energised — sponsor all meals and snacks across three days.

events.name: DevConnect Amsterdam 2026
events.tagline: A Week of Ethereum Deep Dives
events.description: DevConnect is a week-long gathering of Ethereum developers, researchers, and builders split across independent co-located events. Amsterdam hosts the 2026 edition — 2,000+ attendees, 20+ events across the city, and unprecedented access to the people shaping the protocol.

items.shortDescription: Headline sponsor of the entire DevConnect Amsterdam week — maximum reach across all events.

benefits.label: Branded lounge
benefits.value: Dedicated sponsor lounge for the week

items.shortDescription: Sponsor one of the five thematic co-located events and own that topic.
Host one of the official DevConnect networking nights for 400+ attendees.
Co-present the Ethereum research programme with EF researchers and academics.
Visibility across the DevConnect week for smaller teams and protocols.
Fund on-site childcare so parents can attend — a stand-out values statement.

events.name: ETHLisbon 2026
events.description: ETHLisbon 2026 brings 600 builders, investors, and creators to Lisbon's LX Factory for two days of talks, workshops, and side events. Known for its warm culture and thriving startup scene, Lisbon is one of Web3's favourite European hubs.
events.location: LX Factory, Rua Rodrigues de Faria 103

items.shortDescription: Exclusive co-branding across ETHLisbon — 600 attendees, one partner.
Stage access, 4×3m booth, and strong digital presence.
A 3×2m booth, a lightning talk, and growing presence in the Iberian Web3 scene.
Entry-level visibility for DAOs, ecosystems, and early-stage projects.
Name and run a 90-minute hands-on workshop for 60 developers.
Host 60 speakers and VIPs at a private dinner in a traditional Lisbon restaurant.

crowdfundCampaigns.entityDescription: The largest Spanish-speaking Ethereum community with 2,000+ members across Barcelona, Madrid, and Valencia. We run monthly meetups and a yearly hackathon. Sponsoring ETHMilan would let us bring 20 developers to the event and grow our cross-border presence in Southern Europe.

contributions.name: Pablo Ruiz
contributions.message: Proud to back the Barcelona community!

crowdfundCampaigns.entityDescription: Italy's fastest-growing DeFi community — 900 members in Rome, Florence, and Naples. We are close to home for ETHMilan and want to represent the Italian Ethereum scene on the big stage.
The official zkSync community channel with 5,000+ developers. We funded the coffee station at ETHPrague and want to bring that same energy to Milan.

Turkey's premier Web3 community, representing 3,000+ builders across Istanbul, Ankara, and Izmir. We want to send a delegation to ETHMilan and showcase the growing Turkish Ethereum ecosystem to Southern Europe.
A non-profit advancing decentralised education and open-source tooling in the Ethereum ecosystem.
A developer collective building layer-2 tooling for EVM-compatible chains.
A non-profit advancing decentralised education and open-source tooling in the Ethereum ecosystem.
A developer collective building layer-2 tooling for EVM-compatible chains.

bids.notes: We are very interested in the Premium package. We have been growing fast in the European market and ETHMilan is a perfect fit. Can we also discuss a speaking slot?
bids.internalNotes: Strong lead - follow up about panel topic

messages.content: Hi! We're excited about the Premium Sponsor opportunity at ETHMilan. Acme Protocol has 12M weekly users and we'd love to discuss co-branding options.
Thanks Alice! We're reviewing your bid. A few questions: Can you share your target audience demographic, and are you interested in the networking dinner sponsorship add-on?
Our core audience is Ethereum devs and L2 ecosystem teams — exactly your crowd. Yes, very interested in the dinner add-on. Budget would be $25k + the dinner package.

bids.notes: Looking for a 15% discount given our multi-event commitment.

counterOffer.message: We can meet you at $18,500 — includes the Silver package plus one extra speaking slot. Valid for 7 days.

messages.content: Submitting at $17k — we have budget constraints this quarter but strong interest in ETHMilan.
Thanks Alice. We can offer $18,500 with an extra speaking slot. Counter-offer sent — please review.

bids.notes: Happy to brand the coffee station — great touchpoint for developers.
Interested in the networking lunch — great opportunity to meet ecosystem leads.
Digital ad placements across the venue screens.

messages.content: Thanks for your interest Alice. Unfortunately this slot has been allocated to an exclusive sponsor. We'd love to find another package that works for Acme.

bids.notes: Newsletter slot — withdrawn due to budget reallocation.
